title: EIA Henry Hub Natural Gas Spot Prices Daily JSON API
description:
Natural Gas Spot and Futures Prices

- Spot prices are based on delivery at the Henry Hub in Louisiana
- Futures prices are official daily closing prices at 2:30 p.m. from the trading floor of the New York Mercantile Exchange (NYMEX) for a specific delivery month.

⚠️ This feed is refreshed once a week and does not include weekends and holidays.

**NOTE**: Futures prices do not extend beyond April 5, 2024
